name: The Necronomicon
subtitle: John Dee Translation
text: Revelation - Put The Necronomicon into play in your threat area, with 3 horror on it. It cannot leave play while it has 1 or more horror on it. Action (Free): Move 1 horror from The Necronomicon to Daisy Walker.
text_cn: 揭示 - 将死灵之书放入你的威胁区域，上面放置3个恐惧标记。只要上面有1个或以上的恐惧标记，它就不能离场。自由行动：将1个恐惧标记从死灵之书移到黛西·沃克身上。
